content:
𝐄𝐘 𝐈𝐧𝐝𝐢𝐚 𝐇𝐢𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐠 | 𝐆𝐨𝐯𝐞𝐫𝐧𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐏𝐮𝐛𝐥𝐢𝐜 𝐒𝐞𝐜𝐭𝐨𝐫

𝐄𝐱𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐜𝐞: 0–2 𝐲𝐞𝐚𝐫𝐬 | 𝐋𝐨𝐜𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧: Pan 𝐈𝐧𝐝𝐢𝐚
EY India is looking for highly adaptive, proactive, and result-driven professionals who thrive in fast-paced environments and are eager to make a meaningful impact, to join our Government & Public Sector practice, working on high-impact projects driving policy, governance, and public service transformation.

𝐊𝐞𝐲 𝐑𝐞𝐬𝐩𝐨𝐧𝐬𝐢𝐛𝐢𝐥𝐢𝐭𝐢𝐞𝐬:
Research, data analysis, and policy insights
Support project delivery and client engagements
Prepare reports, presentations, and recommendations
Collaborate with teams and manage timelines

𝐑𝐞𝐪𝐮𝐢𝐫𝐞𝐦𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬:
Strong analytical, communication, and problem-solving skills
Proficiency in necessary software and leading AI skills.
Degree in Public Policy, Planning, Design, Management, Business, or related fields.

If you are meeting the above criteria, or know someone, please DM!

Thank you.
